description: Phase 2/3 clinical trial design via gsDesign / gsDesign2: sample size, GS boundaries, multiplicity
name: io.github.wei-ai-lab/clinical-trial-design

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the Rscript binary path. Defaults to whatever 'Rscript' resolves to on the system PATH. Set this if R isn't on PATH or you need a specific R version.
environmentVariables.name: DESIGNR_RSCRIPT

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the R launcher path (the inst/launcher.R that sources the R sources and dispatches the JSON). Defaults to the bundled launcher. Set this only if you need to use a non-bundled R source tree.
environmentVariables.name: DESIGNR_LAUNCHER
